$description: Component tokens for Mobile Radio button component. Supports selected (checked) and unselected (unchecked) states with default, hover, focus, disabled, and error states. Radio buttons are circular selection controls used in groups where only one option can be selected. Figma Reference: Node ID 126-27359

$component.name: Radio
$component.description: A mobile radio button component for single selection within a group of options. Consists of a circular container with an optional inner dot indicator when selected. Radio buttons are used in groups where only one option can be selected at a time, making them ideal for mutually exclusive choices.
$component.structure: Circular container with optional inner dot (check mark) when selected. Container background and border change based on selection state and interaction state.

sizes.default: 20px diameter - Standard mobile radio button size

variants.unselected: Radio button in unselected state - white/neutral background
variants.selected: Radio button in selected state - primary blue background with white inner dot

usage.contexts: Mobile forms, settings panels, preference selection, single-choice questions, mobile data entry interfaces, mobile configuration screens
usage.features: Single selection within groups, focus indicators, hover feedback, disabled state, error validation, visual selection feedback

container.$comment: Container size and border properties for mobile radio button

xs.description: Mobile radio button container size for xs variant - 12px

sm.description: Mobile radio button container size for sm variant - 16px

md.description: Mobile radio button container size for md variant - 20px

lg.description: Mobile radio button container size for lg variant - 24px

radius.description: Fully rounded border radius for mobile radio button - circular shape

background.$comment: Background colors for mobile radio button in unselected and selected states

default.description: Mobile unselected radio default background - neutral/gray-0 - #ffffff (white)

focused.description: Mobile unselected radio focused background - neutral/gray-0 - #ffffff (white, focus indicated by border)

disabled.description: Mobile unselected radio disabled background - neutral/gray-100 - #f2f4f7 (light gray)

default.description: Mobile selected radio default background - primary/blue-600 - #155eef (solid blue)

focused.description: Mobile selected radio focused background - primary/blue-600 - #155eef (solid blue, focus indicated by border)

disabled.description: Mobile selected radio disabled background - neutral/gray-300 - #d0d5dd (medium gray)

border.$comment: Border colors for mobile radio button in unselected and selected states

default.description: Mobile unselected radio default border - transparent - no visible border

focused.description: Mobile unselected radio focused border - primary/blue-500 - #2e90fa (light blue border for focus indicator)

disabled.description: Mobile unselected radio disabled border - transparent - no visible border

error.description: Mobile unselected radio error border - error/red-500 - #f04438 (red border for error/validation state)

default.description: Mobile selected radio default border - transparent - no visible border (selection indicated by background color)

focused.description: Mobile selected radio focused border - primary/blue-500 - #2e90fa (light blue border for focus indicator)

disabled.description: Mobile selected radio disabled border - transparent - no visible border

error.description: Mobile selected radio error border - error/red-500 - #f04438 (red border for error/validation state, overlays selected state)

check-mark.$comment: Inner dot (check mark) color for selected mobile radio button

default.description: Mobile selected radio check mark default color - neutral/gray-0 - #ffffff (white dot on blue background)

effects.$comment: Visual effects for mobile radio button including focus indicators

focused.description: Focus shadow for mobile radio button - focus 2xs primary 100 (subtle blue glow for accessibility)
